title: Air Barrier Discontinuity at Parapet Cap — Cold Climate
failure_mode: Air barrier terminates at parapet base without connection to cap flashing, creating bypass path for air leakage and condensation
frequency: recurring — observed in 8 projects across climate zones 5A/6A/7
notes: Condensation forms on interior face of parapet during heating season. Staining and mold growth observed within 2-4 years. Root cause is detailing gap — air barrier membrane stops at roof deck level and is not carried over or through parapet wall.
